name: Inositol
summary: Improves insulin sensitivity and ovulatory function in PCOS.
description: Inositol supports insulin second-messenger signaling and has evidence for improving ovulatory function in PCOS, aligning with insulin resistance and metabolic control.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: Inositol has relatively strong PCOS/metabolic evidence, but this source does not justify Sleep/Stress/Anxiety/Focus claims.
claimMap.notes: Inositol has relatively strong PCOS/metabolic evidence, but this source does not justify Sleep/Stress/Anxiety/Focus claims.

sources.title: Inositol is an effective and safe treatment in polycystic ovary syndrome: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials
sources.citation: 26 RCTs/1691 PCOS patients; good metabolic/reproductive evidence but not a direct Sleep/Stress/Anxiety/Focus source.
